scripts.build:tests:cargo: cd programs && cargo wasi build -r && cd .. && cp programs/target/wasm32-wasi/release/*.wasi.wasm public/bin/tests/
scripts.build:tests:wat: wat2wasm programs/wasix-clock-random/wasix-clock-random.wat -o public/bin/tests/wasix-clock-random.wasm && wat2wasm programs/wasix-deterministic/wasix-deterministic.wat -o public/bin/tests/wasix-deterministic.wasm && wat2wasm programs/wasix-bridge-clock/wasix-bridge-clock.wat -o public/bin/tests/wasix-bridge-clock.wasm
scripts.build:tests: (npm run build:tests:cargo || echo 'cargo-wasi step failed or missing — skipping Rust test binaries') && npm run build:tests:wat
scripts.build: npm run build:docs && npm run build:vite && rimraf dist/src && mv dist/lib/* dist/ && rmdir dist/lib
scripts.test:cargo: cargo install cargo-wasi || echo Please install cargo to run the tests
scripts.test:download: wget --directory-prefix=public/bin/ https://github.com/caspervonb/wasi-test-suite/archive/refs/heads/main.zip && unzip -u public/bin/main.zip -d public/bin/ && rm public/bin/main.zip
scripts.test:prepare:wasixcc: echo 'Install wasixcc manually: see https://github.com/wasix-org/wasix-libc (CI installs it automatically).'
scripts.test:prepare: npm run test:mkdir && npm run test:download && npm run test:cargo && npm run build:tests && npm run test:prepare:wasix-suite
